publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-10-04 18:27:04 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: George M. Mead papers
did.abstract: Sermons and correspondence relating to Ives Seminary, Antwerp, Jefferson County, New York and Kirkville, Onondaga County, New York; correspondence relating to the National Accident Society of New York City, to inventions and a water-filter business, to the Seneca Chief Vineyard Co., Denver real estate, and from the Remington brothers of Ilion, New York. Also, correspondence and other material relating to land speculation in Harris County, Texas, with settlers drawn from Nebraska, by La Porte Investment Company, Syracuse, with E. W. Bliss, and F. W. Clark.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Sermons and correspondence relating to Ives Seminary, Antwerp, Jefferson County, New York and Kirkville, Onondaga County, New York; correspondence relating to the National Accident Society of New York City, to inventions and a water-filter business, to the Seneca Chief Vineyard Co., Denver real estate, and from the Remington brothers of Ilion, New York. Also, correspondence and other material relating to land speculation in Harris County, Texas, with settlers drawn from Nebraska, by La Porte Investment Company, Syracuse, with E. W. Bliss, and F. W. Clark.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: George M. Mead Papers, #318. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to box list. PDF file.

did.unittitle: Series I. Certificates

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Teaching, Deacon, Elder and Preacher's Certificates for the Methodist Episcopal Church and Academic Certificates

did.unittitle: George Mead
Orpha Wilcox

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Teacher's Certificate

did.unittitle: Orpha Wilcox

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Teacher's Certificate

did.unittitle: George Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Preacher's Certificate

did.unittitle: George Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Teacher's Certificate

did.unittitle: Orpha Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Teacher's Certificate

did.unittitle: George Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Preacher's Certificate

did.unittitle: George Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Deacon's Certificate

did.unittitle: George Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Elder's Certificate

did.unittitle: Academic Certificate
Belle King

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Teacher's Certificate

did.unittitle: Belle King

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Academic Certificate for Belle King from the Regents of the University of the State of New York.

did.unittitle: Teacher Certificates

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Teacher Certificates for Charles Mead and Belle King.

did.unittitle: George Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Elder's Certificate in the Methodist Episcopal Church

did.unittitle: Series II. Minutes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes of the Black River Annual Conference of the Methodist Episcopal Church

did.unittitle: Syracuse, Onondaga County, New York
Mexicoville, Oswego County, N.Y.
Lowville, Lewis County, N.Y.
Fulton, Oswego County, N.Y.
Rome, Oneida County, N.Y.
Syracuse, Onondaga County, N.Y.
Series III. Correspondence
Frank Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Frank Mead, Ives Seminary, Antwerp, to his brother Charles Mead. Frank wants Charles to go to Antwerp immediately.

did.unittitle: Report

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report of Oswego District, N. Y. Conference, April 15, 1886 from George M. Mead, Presiding Elder.

did.unittitle: George A. Fuller to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George A. Fuller, Ives Seminary, Antwerp, N.Y. to Charles Mead.

did.unittitle: George A. Fuller to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George A. Fuller, Ives Seminary, Antwerp, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re. School news and an invitation to visit Ives Seminary.

did.unittitle: Cazenovia Seminary

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from (?), Cazenovia Seminary, Cazenovia, N. Y. re: School news

did.unittitle: F. L. Mead to Floyd

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Frank L. Mead, Ives Seminary, Antwerp, N. Y. to Floyd. Re: Mead will try to help Floyd get a teaching position.

did.unittitle: Frank Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Frank Mead, Burke, N.Y. to Charles Mead telling Charles what he has been doing lately.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, New York City, to Charles Mead. Re: News about the National Accident Society.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, New York City, to Charles Mead. Re: News of what the writer has been doing.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, New York City, to Charles Mead. Re: Business news.

did.unittitle: George A. Fuller to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George A. Fuller, Antwerp, N.Y. to Charles Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. Re: School news

did.unittitle: W. C. Reeves to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from W. C. Reeves, Theresa, N. Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Personal news.

did.unittitle: George A. Fuller to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George A. Fuller, Potsdam, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: School and personal news

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead to Charles Mead. Re: George Mead is thinking of going into the real estate business.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead, Ives Seminary, Antwerp, N.Y. Re: Family and Personal news. George Mead still thinking of going into real estate in the West.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: George Mead setting out for the West to sell the Revoir Filter (a water filter).

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Personal letter.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Family and neighborhood news.

did.unittitle: Office of Remington Armory

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Office of Remington's Armory, P. Remington and E. Remington, Ilion, N.Y. Letter of recommendation for Rev. George M. Mead.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: News about the filter venture. Family and neighborhood news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Rome, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: News of the filter business. George Mead has sent Charles the typewriter. Neighborhood news.

did.unittitle: Alvah M. Thompson to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Alvah M. Thompson, Cazenovia, N.Y. to Charles Mead, Antwerp, N.Y. re: Thompson will not be able to attend school at Ives Seminary because he has already made arrangements at Cazenovia

did.unittitle: E. Remington to George M. Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from E. Remington, Ilion, N.Y. to George M. Mead. Re: Information about a letter of Introduction for Mead.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Business and personal news

did.unittitle: Frank Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Frank Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to his brother Charles Mead, Antwerp, N.Y. re: Encourages brother to keep up with Latin studies. Talks about neighborhood news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: George Mead hasn't left for the West yet. News of the filter business.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Chicago, Ill. to Charles Mead. Re: news of the filter business

did.unittitle: Frank Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Frank Mead, Chateaugay, N.Y. to Charles Mead, Antwerp, N.Y. Re: Personal letter. School news. Tuition at Syracuse will be only $30.00

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Money is scarce at the Syracuse office.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Houston, Texas to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Mead wants Charles to bring food and meet him and others at Arcadian.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Houston, Texas to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Mead sends money and information about the company.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Grand Island, Nebraska to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business information.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Grand Island, Nebraska to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business information.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Grand Island, Nebraska to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business information. Clark's father has died.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Grand Island, Nebraska to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business matters.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Grand Island, Nebraska to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business information. Clark is going to run the Hotel.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business matters.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business and family matters.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business news. Clark is in Houston.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business matters.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Chicago, Ill. to Charles Mead. Re: news of the filter business

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Chicago, Ill. to Charles Mead. Re: news of the filter business. Sales are slow.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Chicago, Ill. to Charles Mead. Re: News of the filter business.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Personal news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to his son Charles Mead. Re: George Mead has invented a new filter for which he is applying for a patent. He encloses a drawing of the filter.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: news of the filter business.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Personal letter.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead , Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: business news

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Personal news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Business and personal news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letters from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. This group of letters contain personal and family news; accounts of what is going on in the filter business and what is being done on the family farm.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Letter contains a lecture on the qualities to look for in a wife.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Letter has family news but is incomplete.

did.unittitle: Invitation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Invitation to an Ives Seminary Commencement June 17-20, 1888

did.unittitle: Programme

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A Programme of Students and Alumni Banquet for Ives Seminary, Antwerp, N.Y.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. George Mead wants his son Charles to spend his vacation at home. Other family news.

did.unittitle: Woodward to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Woodward to Charles Mead, a request for Mead to teach school. Announcement of a marriage.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letters from George M. Mead, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. This group of letters contain news of the farm and personal news. George Mead is taking a new job in an insurance company. In February his daughter Grace will be getting married.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. The father will be visiting his son.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Clayville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Harrison has been elected President of the United States.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Elmira, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Personal news.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Rome, N.Y. to Charles Mead. George Mead is going to Watertown and he wants Charles to meet him there.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Personal financial matters.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: About Denver real estate business.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: A Mr. Fisher wants to buy Charles' wheel.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: George Mead is setting out for Denver. Charles wife, Belle, is sick.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Something has been lost and George Mead asks Charles for information about the lost item.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: The time tables have not been sent out yet.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Charles is to sign a note. George Mead might arrive on the 4th.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Business matters.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Charles can pick out a lot on a plot of a LaPorte, Texas block. A Mrs. Bartlett and a Mr. Peper have died.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Business affairs.

did.unittitle: Frank Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Frank Mead, Walcott to Charles Mead. Re: Frank sends his brother camera information.

did.unittitle: Land title

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Title to land in LaPorte, Texas from George M. Mead to Charles Mead for the sum of $100.00

did.unittitle: E. E. Waful to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Edward Everett Waful, Cornell University to Charles Mead, Antwerp, N.Y. Re: Waful can not send Mead a banquet programme but will send him a facsimile.

did.unittitle: A Philologos Society Paper

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "A Society Paper - Read before the Philos at their last regular meeting of the winter term '88. Charles Mead, Editor.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: The son is in charge of business at the LaPorte office and has not sent in the report which was requested.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: The son had worked for money which the Syracuse office is not going to send him. Mead says that Charles has not been handling the business well.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Charles still has not sent to Syracuse the requested information.

did.unittitle: F. W. Clark to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from F. W. Clark to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Charles has sent in to the Syracuse office an insurance policy with the wrong name on it.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Father is sending financial statements.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Charles Mead has sent in an account of what has been happening in the business and Mead thanks him for the account. Asks Charles to send the grocery books to Syracuse.

did.unittitle: M.A. Rulison to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from M.A. Rulison, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. A letter of sympathy, Charlie's son has died.

did.unittitle: (?) to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A letter from (?) Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. A letter of introduction for a Mr. Mortimer Stevenson who is interested in buying land.

did.unittitle: Receipt

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A receipt from Charles Mead acknowledgement of payment for land from Eugene E. Butler.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to F. H. Stinard

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to F. H. Stinard, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business matters.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to F. H. Stinard

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to F. H. Stinard, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business matters.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to F. H. Stinard

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to F. H. Stinard, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business matters.

did.unittitle: George Seleman to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George Seleman, LaPorte, Texas to Charles Mead, LaPorte, Texas. Re: Business news.

did.unittitle: Bill of Sale

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bill of Sale to (?) Mead from George M. Mead, Onondaga County, N.Y.

did.unittitle: Mother to Family

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from "Mother", Kirkville, N.Y. to children, family. Re: Neighborhood news

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: Personal letter

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Dewitt, N.Y. to Charles Mead. George Mead is ill and asks son Charles for help.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Dewitt, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Acknowledged receipt of money from Charles.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Dewitt, N.Y. to Charles Mead. George M. Mead has been ill.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Doctor

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead to Doctor (?). Mead informs the doctor of his (Mead's) condition.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Dewitt, N.Y. to his son Charles Mead. Re: George Mead's health is improving slowly.

did.unittitle: J. B. Todd to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from J. B. Todd, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead, New York City. Recommendation that George Mead move to New York City into a more comfortable home and to the Adirondack Mountains.

did.unittitle: George W. Palmer to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George W. Palmer, Kirkville, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Palmer advises that George Mead not be moved to New York City.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Dewitt, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Mr. Mead writes that Dr. Todd is wrong and that he doesn't want to go to the mountains.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from George M. Mead, Dewitt, N.Y. to Charles Mead. George is upset at the ill feelings between him and his son and says that the son has his love no matter what happens. There is a note on the same letter to Charles from Mabel. Mabel says that their father is dying and doesn't realize it. She says he can not live very long.

did.unittitle: Frank Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Frank Mead, Syracuse, N.Y. to Charles Mead. Re: The photograph negatives arrived in bad shape. Two of their father arrived safely in good condition.

did.unittitle: Wesley Mead to nieces and nephews

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Wesley Mead, San Antonio, Texas to his nieces and nephews Charles, Frank, Grace, Hattie, and Mabel.

did.unittitle: George M. Mead to Charles Mead

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letters from George M. Mead to his son Charles concerning the land in Texas owned by the LaPorte Investment Company of Syracuse, N.Y. The business did not do very well and from the correspondence it seems that toward the end of the venture the Company began to fail.

did.unittitle: Series IV. Miscellaneous Items
Diary

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Diary of George M. Mead - Handwritten copy made April 2, 1929

did.unittitle: Booklet of marriage certificates
Record of marriages
Resolution

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerns quarterly conference of the Arsenal Street Methodist Episcopal Church
